zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan Basset於1155年出生在英國維爾爾丁頓時，他的父親Thomas Basset25歲，母親Adeliza Dunstanville21歲。他於1178年與Aline de Gai在英國巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1217年在英國盧特藍德被列為sheriff。他去世於1232年10月17日在英國英格蘭波克夏愛丁頓享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan Basset于1155年出生在英国維爾爾丁頓时，他的父亲Thomas Basset25岁，母亲Adeliza Dunstanville21岁。他于1178年与Aline de Gai在英国巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1217年在英国盧特藍德被列为sheriff。他去世于1232年10月17日在英国英格兰波克夏愛丁頓享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan Basset was born in 1155, in Heddington, Wiltshire, England, his father, Thomas Basset, was 25 and his mother, Adeliza Dunstanville, was 21. He married Aline de Gai in 1178, in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. In 1217, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Rutland, England. He died on 17 October 1232, in Eddington, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan Basset est né en 1155, à Heddington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Dunstanville, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Aline de Gai en 1178, à High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. En 1217, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Rutland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1232, à Eddington, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan Basset 1155 in Heddington, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Basset 25 und seine Mutter Adeliza Dunstanville 21. Er hat 1178 in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England Aline de Gai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1217 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Rutland, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1232 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Eddington, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Basset è nato il nel 1155 nel Heddington, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Basset, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Dunstanville, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Aline de Gai nel 1178, nel High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Nel 1217, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Rutland, England. Morì il 17 ottobre 1232, nel Eddington, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Bassetが1155年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘッドイントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Bassetは25歳，母Adeliza Dunstanvilleは21歳であった。1178年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヒグ ウイコンベでAline de Gaiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。1217年，イギリスルトランドでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1232年10月17日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエッドイントンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Basset(이)가 1155년 영국 윌츠히르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Basset(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Dunstanville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1178년 영국 벅잉함실르 히 윈이코브에서 Aline de Gai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1217년, 그의 직업은 영국 루틀랜드에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1232년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 에딩턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Basset nasceu em 1155, em Heddington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Basset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Dunstanville, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Aline de Gai em 1178, em High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Em 1217, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Rutland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1232, em Eddington, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan Basset родился в 1155 г. в местности хеддингтон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Basset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Dunstanville, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline de Gai в 1178 г. в местности хаи викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. В 1217 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности рутланд, Англия. Он умер 17 октября 1232 г. в местности эддингтон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan Basset nació en 1155, en Heddington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Basset, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adeliza Dunstanville, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Aline de Gai en 1178, en High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. En 1217, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Rutland, Inglaterra. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1232, en Eddington, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
